# J.H. Textiles

> A Nigerian print design studio specializing in exclusive surface patterns — from abstract digital aesthetics to watercolor florals — merging bold digital design with traditional painting techniques. Optimized for digital printing, screen printing, jacquard, adire, batik, and more.

## About
J.H. Textiles was born from a lifelong fascination with patterns, inspired by the bold Ankara prints worn by women across Nigeria. Every design is crafted to tell a story that stands the test of time, regardless of surface or medium. We serve fashion brands, home décor companies, product manufacturers, and entrepreneurs — merging Nigerian fabric design with international design excellence.

## Services

### Ready-Made Print Licensing
- Browse a curated pattern library
- High-resolution files delivered within 24 hours
- Available under Non-Exclusive or Exclusive licenses
- Each license includes 3 colorways

### Custom Design Services
- Bespoke prints delivered in 4–8 weeks
- Up to 6 revisions included
- 50% deposit required to begin

### Specialized Services (10 total)
- Design consultation for creative direction
- Custom prints tailored to your brand identity
- Placement prints engineered for specific garments
- Print rescaling across different product formats
- Illustration and original artwork
- Color separation for screen printing, adire, batik, and jacquard
- Seasonal colorway development
- Print development from client concepts
- Rush service for urgent deadlines

## Clients & Trusted By
DLCT Contemporary, The Ladymaker, Meiji Meji, Grapes Pattern Bank, Nyosi Brand, Akwa Baby

## Design Specialties
- Abstract digital aesthetics
- Watercolor florals
- Ankara-inspired bold prints
- Storied, timeless pattern design
- Versatile patterns for fabric and surface design

## Production Method Compatibility
Digital printing, screen printing, jacquard weaving, adire, batik
